operations-research.label: 运筹学
operations-research.description: Operations research, supply chain optimization, inventory control, planning, scheduling, and quantitative decision methods.

inventory-planning.label: 库存规划
inventory-planning.description: Inventory planning and control, including safety stock, reorder point, EOQ, service level, spare parts, and replenishment policies.

llm.label: LLM
llm.description: Large language models, model architecture, training, inference, serving, evaluation, and systems.

mixture-of-experts.label: Mixture of Experts
mixture-of-experts.description: Sparse expert models, routing, load balancing, expert parallelism, and MoE engineering tradeoffs.

general.label: 通用
general.description: Catch-all domain used only when no stable major domain applies.
